caption: A man with blonde hair, wearing thin-rimmed circular glasses, large silver over-ear headphones, and a dark blue textured garment, is shown in a close-up shot. He is positioned with his head tilted backward, facing toward the camera. In the background, a blue-framed gaming machine is visible, featuring the number "20" displayed on a screen. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and reacting, with his mouth open and shifting expressions. His head moves slightly, and his facial muscles tighten as he speaks. The lighting is bright, highlighting the metallic finish of his headphones and the frames of his glasses. The background remains consistent, showing a glimpse of an arcade-like environment with colorful lights and the digital display of the gaming equipment.
